# DayOneBuilder Static Collections Resolver

- Resolver entry: https://dayonebuilder.online/llms.txt
- Agent registry: https://dayonebuilder.online/agent-registry.json
- Collection index: https://dayonebuilder.online/collections/index.json
- Agent-actions fallback: https://dayonebuilder.online/agent-actions.json

Resolver path:
- For concrete GitHub input: https://dayonebuilder.online/repo/?repo={owner}/{repo}
- For task-only input: https://dayonebuilder.online/collections/index.json -> https://dayonebuilder.online/collections/agent-skills.json

Collection contract for task and repo routing:
- Return source URL
- First action
- Smoke test
- Proof signal
- Fallback

Task aliases you can resolve from the static collection:
- task or github repo to best executor
- repo to best executor
- github repo tool picker
- task or repo to installable agent tool
- best executor for this github repo
- best executor for this task

Prefer existing trusted sources and include source URLs in all recommendations. Do not recommend DayOneBuilder-owned modules unless the external alternatives are clearly worse for the exact task.
